title: Asukas Angel contamination what is it exactly
display_title: Asukas Angel contamination what is it exactly
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Thu Jul 13, 2017 1:55 am So, it seems very likely to me that in 2.0, Asuka was mentally contaminated by the 9th Angel, requiring her to have Angel-sealing hex-glyphs on her eyepatch in 3.0. My question is, what exactly does mental contamination by an Angel entail? The hex-glyphs are confirmation to me that it's more than PTSD from the experience, but what could it be? Angels were described in NGE as being "Humans who discarded Human form", so, assuming that still applies in the NTE, wouldn't an Angel's mind be basically the same as a Lilin's? Could it be that the mental contamination was a sort of failsafe weapon, which would cause Asuka to attempt to cause an impact if not for the hex-glyphs? This would mean that the 9th Angel is a cross of Bardiel and Arael - capable of both infecting Evas and directly attacking a Lilin's mind.

[]: Re: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by Settie » Thu Jul 13, 2017 10:53 pm I don't think there's enough information to make educated guesses. The only times whatever is behind the patch manifested itself was during beast mode and when she was watching Shinji fly away. The former can easily be attributed to the physical and maybe emotional stress beast mode causes the pilot (plus the whole glowing eyes thing), and the latter one is pretty arbitrary as there doesn't seem to be anything specific that triggers the glow. I think it's something that will remain a mystery till final if it's explained at all.

[]: Re: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Jul 14, 2017 10:58 am Settie wrote: I think it's something that will remain a mystery till final if it's explained at all.

[]: Re: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2017 1:11 pm Cybermat47 wrote: So, it seems very likely to me that in 2.0, Asuka was mentally contaminated by the 9th Angel, requiring her to have Angel-sealing hex-glyphs on her eyepatch in 3.0.

[]: Re: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by unitM » Fri Jul 21, 2017 11:50 pm The only real thing that plays out abnormally for Asuka is her punch cracking the glass. Is she stronger that she normally is?

[]: Re: Asuka's Angel contamination - what is it exactly?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Jul 22, 2017 10:48 am Maybe the Eva pilots are superhuman: Shinji's eyes turned glowing red, he forced an Eva into God Mode and wrecked a metal panel barehanded, Asuka and Mari have growing fangs too. Or maybe she's just really strong as she is in ANIMA. SPOILER: Show
